design_language: Premium, Cinematic, Luxury, Minimal, Modern, Automotive, High-end

headings.style_notes: Use for all H1-H4. Emphasizes modern luxury automotive aesthetics. Keep tracking tight (`tracking-tighter`) for H1/H2.

body.style_notes: Clean, highly readable, geometric sans for technical/luxury feel.

navigation.desktop: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-6xl rounded-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50 border border-white/10 z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
navigation.mobile: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] rounded-2xl backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 border border-white/10 z-50 flex justify-around p-4
navigation.notes: NO Bootstrap navbar. NO transparent background without blur. NO hamburger on desktop. Include Logo, Nav links, and SOS/WhatsApp CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD500] text-black font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#E5C000] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,213,0,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white/5 transition-all
buttons.sos: bg-red-600 text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-full animate-pulse shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(220,38,38,0.5)]
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-[#1DA851]

cards.service: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 p-6 hover:border-[#FFD500]/30 transition-colors duration-500
cards.testimonial: rounded-2xl p-8 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#1a1a1a] to-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 relative

layouts.hero: h-screen w-full relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
layouts.services_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layouts.timeline: relative border-l border-white/10 ml-6 pl-8 space-y-12

motion.stagger_children: Framer Motion: { hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }
motion.hover_glow: opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500 absolute inset-0 bg-radial-gradient from-[#FFD500]/10 to-transparent
motion.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll to move background images slightly slower than foreground content

visual_enhancers.particles: Use lightweight canvas or react-tsparticles for subtle floating dust/sparks in hero section to give a workshop atmosphere.
visual_enhancers.headlight_glow: Absolute positioned divs with `w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-white/5 blur-[120px] rounded-full mix-blend-screen` placed strategically behind cars or text.
visual_enhancers.vignette: Overlay `bg-radial-gradient from-transparent to-black/80` on hero images for cinematic focus.

hero_main.description: Silver Mercedes Benz in dark cinematic garage

hero_alt.description: Black luxury SUV in a dark garage

mechanic_working.description: Professional mechanic inspecting car in auto repair shop

engine_service.description: The engine compartment of a car with the hood up

brakes_service.description: Close up of a brake on a vehicle

tires_service.description: Detailed monochrome shot of a black sports car wheel

cleaning_service.description: Water splash on black coupe during car wash

tow_truck_sos.description: Tow truck night rescue in urban environment

instructions_to_main_agent.architecture: Build a React + Tailwind + Vite (or Next.js if configured) frontend. Use Framer Motion heavily for scroll reveals, Ken Burns, and parallax.
instructions_to_main_agent.pricing_rule: CRITICAL: NEVER show repair prices. ONLY show 'Inspection Charge ₹599 Fixed (Home/Roadside/Garage)'.
instructions_to_main_agent.booking_flow: Booking forms must capture (Name, Mobile, Car Details, Location, Issue) and ON SUBMIT redirect to WhatsApp (+91 9281410305) with a prefilled message.
instructions_to_main_agent.sos_flow: SOS Button must be prominently pulsating red and immediately redirect to call or WhatsApp +91 9281410305.
instructions_to_main_agent.pages_required: Home, Services (Grid + 10 Individual Pages), SOS, Gallery, About, Contact
instructions_to_main_agent.logo: Use user uploaded logo or build a placeholder `span` with text 'FIXMYCAR' and yellow wrench icon until real asset is placed. Make it large in the hero/header.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use `lucide-react` for clean, modern iconography. Do NOT use emojis.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_nav: Hide desktop pill nav on mobile. Use a premium bottom navigation bar fixed to bottom, mimicking iOS standard app navs.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT output generic centered 'AI slop'. Embrace asymmetry, wide generous padding (e.g., py-24, py-32), and strong left-alignments.
Never use purely transparent backgrounds on elements that scroll over text/images (like headers). Use backdrop-blur combined with semi-transparent colors (e.g., bg-black/60).
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='sos-button').
NEVER use emojis as icons. Use Lucide React.
Add 'transition-all duration-300' and distinct ':hover' states to every interactive element.
Layer text over images safely by injecting 'bg-black/40' or gradient overlays to ensure APCA/WCAG contrast compliance.
Do not add '.App { text-align: center }'. Let text flow naturally.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., upon form validation failure before WhatsApp redirect).
